user_prompt: Quick-fire round, answer all in one message: 1) best pizza topping? 2) how do black holes form? 3) should I quit my job tomorrow? 4) and one thing about software engineering and system architecture?
model_response:
1) Pepperoni! 🍕  
2) Black holes form when massive stars collapse under their own gravity after exhausting their nuclear fuel.  
3) Think it through! Evaluate your reasons and options before making a hasty decision.  
4) Good software architecture prioritizes modular design, making it easier to maintain and scale over time.
